calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-15-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - BYRON BROWN & BRYAN HUSEMAN, TEL. NO. (916) 317-4220, RESPONDENTS APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE COURT AND THE OPPOSING PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER ALLIANCE ADVERTISING INC.'s Petition To Compel Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 csr # 5976=(302/EHG)
